name: ASUS PRIME B660M-K D4-CSM Intel® B660 (LGA 1700) mATX motherboard with PCIe® 4.0, 2 M.2 slots, DDR4, HDMI®, D-Sub, Realtek 1G Wired LAN, Front USB 3.2 Gen 1, ASUS Lighting Controls
